headline: These 7 Small Caps Are on Fire as the Second Half Begins: Here’s Why
summary: Seven small-cap stocks have surged as much as 123% in early July on buyouts, FDA developments, refinancing deals and short squeezes.

headline: A Diabetes Therapy Just Locked In Its Cell Supplier, and the Race to End Insulin Injections Is Heating Up
summary: (American News Group News Commentary) For the millions of people who manage diabetes with daily insulin injections, the holy grail has always been the same: a therapy that senses blood sugar and releases the right amount of insulin on its own, the way a healthy pancreas does. A growing group of biotech companies is chasing that goal with cell-based therapies, and this week one small player took a concrete step toward making its version real.

headline: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:VRTX): An Affordable Growth Stock Balancing Strong Fundamentals With Reasonable Valuation
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals offers affordable growth with strong double-digit earnings and revenue expansion, zero debt, and a P/E below the S&P 500 average—trading at a deep discount to biotech peers.
